headline: Who’s afraid of the big, bad GPU?
summary: AI's environmental impact, especially GPU usage, is under scrutiny. Data centers consume billions of gallons of water, raising pollution concerns. The true value and sustainability of generative AI's underlying tech are debated.

headline: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
summary: Sony Music is suing AI music generator Udio for copyright infringement. The lawsuit covers over 30,000 songs, including hits from Elvis, Beyoncé, and Harry Styles. Legal action was initiated in a New York court over alleged AI misuse of music.

headline: The FCC is planning to retroactively ban disguised DJI gadgets
summary: The FCC plans to retroactively ban certain gadgets for the first time. The crackdown targets 'DJI front companies' selling disguised products. This action uses the FCC's recently acquired power to block previously approved devices.

headline: The Odyssey turned me into an IMAX believer
summary: The author initially felt conflicted by "The Odyssey's" fantastical scenes. Viewing the film in IMAX resolved these visual discrepancies. The experience transformed the author into an "IMAX believer."

headline: Just 7 PlayStation Games Have Sold More Than 100,000 Physical Copies in the U.S. So Far This Year
summary: Only seven PlayStation games have sold over 100,000 physical copies in the U.S. this year. This data underscores the overwhelming shift towards digital game sales. It reinforces concerns following Sony's plan to end disc production by 2028.

headline: Leon Kennedy Voice Actor Says Metallica, Nirvana Helped Shape His Performance for the Resident Evil Character
summary: Leon Kennedy's voice actor, Nick Apostolides, shared his surprising inspirations. He listened to bands like Metallica and Nirvana to shape his performance. These musical choices influenced his portrayal of Leon in the Resident Evil remakes.

headline: Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link Leak Has Fans Wishing Square Enix Hadn't Canceled Its Mobile Spinoff
summary: Leaked footage of the canceled mobile game, Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link, has surfaced. The apparently nearly finished intro has left fans disappointed. Many fans now wish Square Enix hadn't canceled the mobile spinoff.

headline: Nier Creator Yoko Taro Mourns Death of Physical Media as PlayStation Plans to End Production of Game Discs
summary: Nier creator Yoko Taro mourns the impending end of physical game media. His comments follow Sony's decision to cease PlayStation disc production by 2028. Taro expressed his sadness about the shift away from game discs.

headline: Chris Mason: Starmer ally takes swipe at Burnham's first big policy
summary: Darren Jones, a Starmer ally, publicly criticized Andy Burnham's new policy. He labeled Burnham's proposed VAT cut as 'unfunded.' This marks an early political clash regarding the new government's plans.

headline: Who's in Andy Burnham's cabinet?
summary: An in-depth report details Andy Burnham's new cabinet appointments. Labour MPs have been assigned key ministerial roles. Burnham is forming his government as the new Prime Minister.

headline: Cause of Ann Widdecombe's death not yet established, inquest hears
summary: The cause of Ann Widdecombe's death remains undetermined, an inquest heard. The 78-year-old was found at her Devon home with "visible injuries." Investigations are ongoing into the circumstances of her death on July 9.

headline: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
summary: Donald Trump has imposed a 50% tariff on goods from Canada. This move significantly escalates trade tensions between the two nations. Carney vows to intensify trade discussions in response to the new duties.
